title: Vivi’s Last Chance Shrinks
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on vivi’s last chance shrinks, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi’s Last Chance Shrinks. The crew and Alabasta’s defenders race against time to stop the cannon before the city is destroyed. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Exactly what I've been aiming for!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: As if that wasn't obvious enough...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Kuhahaha! Aren't you looking quite desperate, strawhat!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: If it weren't for that barrel, you wouldn't be able to do a thing...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It seems things haven't really changed at all since our last fight! Kuhahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It's the same as last time if I keep holding onto this!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Now I'm not the same Luffy you've fought!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I don't think you're 'sposed to drink so much water.

summary: This part develops vivi’s last chance shrinks and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
